race.comment: The well-related GALWAY FLYER (9) (half to G2 winner Kirwan's Lane) was impressive when shedding the maiden tag in dominant fashion two back before just missing the frame at the Gold Coast last time out. Winning rider Thornton reunites in the saddle and looks the runner in this field with the most upside. Rates among the leading chances. TENBURY WELLS (6) has been plying his trade in harder Saturday metro grade and will appreciate the drop back in company here. Sure to give backers a sight. DELRICO (3) is one from one over this course and distance and will be ready to peak no third-up from the spell. Shouldn't be underestimated. ARTFUL GIRL (7) gets 1.5kg off with the claim and may trouble the judge with any luck in running. TAP HIGH (11) rounds out the selections in an open race to close out the card.
